    Index

    A B C D F G H I K L M P R S T V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    R

    reset(double, double) - Method in class car.Car
    Resets the car to a clean state for a new race.
    resetAllGroups() - Method in class track.CheckPointGroups
    Resets all checkpoint tiles in all groups back to unhit.
    resetCheckpointCount() - Method in class car.Car
    Resets checkpoint counter.
    resetCheckpoints() - Method in class track.Track
    References CheckPointGroups method of resetting all of the checkpoints colors to the non-hit color when the car crosses the finish.
    resetSpecificCheckpoint(int) - Method in class track.Track
    References CheckPointGroups method of resetting a specific checkpointGroup colors to the non-hit color when the car crosses a checkpoint.
    resetSpecificGroup(int) - Method in class track.CheckPointGroups
    Resets the checkpoint tiles in a specific group
    rotateTo(double) - Method in class car.VelocityVector
    Rotates the vector to a specified angle while preserving magnitude.
    run() - Method in class car.CarController
    Called repeatedly by the Timer to update the game state.
    run() - Method in class gameGUI.PixelDriftGUI
    Called repeatedly by the Timer to update the game state.
    run() - Method in class track.TrackDrawerGUI
    Used to redraw the Track, called by drawinTimer every TIME_TO_UPDATE ms
